errors.invoiceTooLong: Invoice number must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.contactTooLong: Supplier contact name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.phoneTooLong: Supplier phone must be 20 characters or fewer.
errors.emailTooLong: Supplier email must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.notesTooLong: Notes must be 1000 characters or fewer.
errors.expectedDateInvalid: Expected received date must be a valid ISO date string.
errors.expectedDatePast: Expected received date cannot be in the past.
errors.itemsRequired: At least one purchase order item is required.
errors.itemVariantInvalid: Each item must include a valid variantId.
errors.itemQuantityInvalid: Each item must include orderedQty greater than 0.
errors.itemUnitCostInvalid: Each item must include unitCost greater than 0.
errors.duplicateVariant: Duplicate variant entries are not allowed.
errors.variantMissing: One or more variants do not exist.
errors.receiptItemsRequired: At least one receipt item is required.
errors.receiptItemQuantityInvalid: Each receipt item must include quantity greater than 0.
errors.receiptItemReferenceRequired: Each receipt item must include purchaseOrderItemId or variantId.
errors.cancelledCannotReceive: Cancelled purchase orders cannot be received.
errors.alreadyReceived: Purchase order is already fully received.
errors.receiptItemNotFound: One or more receipt items do not belong to this purchase order.
errors.receiptDuplicate: Duplicate receipt items are not allowed.
errors.receiptExceedsOrderedQty: Received quantity exceeds the remaining ordered quantity.
errors.receivedCannotCancel: Received purchase orders cannot be cancelled.
